summary: Comprehensive testing of Wallet & Account Statement system for B2B Travel Platform. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional for Agent Wallet page, Admin Dashboard Wallets tab, and Staff Dashboard.

minor.issue: Login response does not include 'role' field - role is stored in DB but not returned in response. This is a minor inconsistency.

critical_code_review_comments: Agent user (rashid@travotours.ae) had incorrect role='admin' in database - fixed to role='agent' during testing. This was a data issue, not a code bug.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest runs with TEST_ prefix (TEST_topup_pytest, TEST_refund_pytest, TEST_debit_pytest, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet system fully tested. Agent role was corrected in DB. All wallet endpoints require auth token. Statement download is client-side CSV generation. Payment processing in PaymentPage is MOCKED.

backend_apis.GET /api/wallets/my: PASSED - Returns wallet with balance for logged-in agent
backend_apis.GET /api/wallets/all: PASSED - Returns all wallets (admin only, 403 for agents)
backend_apis.POST /api/wallets/debit: PASSED - Deducts from wallet with insufficient balance check
backend_apis.GET /api/wallets/transactions/{user_id}: PASSED - Admin can get specific user transactions
backend_apis.POST /api/wallets/payment-proofs/{id}/re: PASSED - Approve/reject proof and auto-credit wallet on approve
backend_apis.POST /api/wallets/statements/upload: PASSED - Admin can upload bank statements
backend_apis.GET /api/wallets/statements: PASSED - Admin can get all statements

Agent_Wallet_Page.balance_cards: PASSED - Shows Available Balance (AED), Total Credits, Total Debits
Agent_Wallet_Page.transactions_tab: PASSED - Shows transaction history with Date, Type, Note, Amount
Agent_Wallet_Page.payment_proofs_tab: PASSED - Shows proofs with status badges (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED)
Agent_Wallet_Page.upload_proof_modal: PASSED - Has Amount, Reference, Note, File upload fields

Admin_Dashboard_Wallets_Tab.summary_cards: PASSED - Total Balance, Active Wallets, Pending Approvals
Admin_Dashboard_Wallets_Tab.agent_wallets_table: PASSED - Shows Agent, Email, Balance, Top Up button
Admin_Dashboard_Wallets_Tab.pending_proofs_section: PASSED - Shows pending proofs with Approve/Reject buttons
Admin_Dashboard_Wallets_Tab.topup_modal: PASSED - Has Amount, Note fields and Credit Wallet button

Staff_Dashboard.agent_wallets_tab: PASSED - Shows agent list with Top Up and History buttons
Staff_Dashboard.topup_modal: PASSED - Has Top Up/Refund toggle, Amount, Note fields
Staff_Dashboard.payment_proofs_tab: PASSED - Shows all proofs with approve/reject buttons for pending
Staff_Dashboard.statements_tab: PASSED - Shows uploaded statements with Download links and Upload button

mocked_apis_note: Payment processing in PaymentPage is MOCKED. Send email in SendEmailModal is simulated delay.
